title: Anchettidurgam
tagline: Anchettidurgam — heritage city of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Anchettidurgam or Anchetty Durgam is a fort in the present day Krishnagiri district in Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Anchettidurgam or Anchetty Durgam is a fort in the present day Krishnagiri district in Tamil Nadu. It was also spelled as anchittidrug, anchitty droog because of the British pronunciation and writing style. Durg or durgam means fort. It was one of the 12 forts of barahmahal.

topPlaces.name: Sacred Heart Church, Kelamangalam
topPlaces.description: The Sacred Heart Church in Kelamangalam is Roman Catholic Church situated in the Krishnagiri district of Tamil Nadu, India. In the 17th century, many Catholics and priests settled in this village for their missionary activities, making it one of the origin places for Catholic Christians in its Diocese.

topPlaces.name: Kelamangalam
topPlaces.description: Kelamangalam is a panchayat town in Krishnagiri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Advanapalli
topPlaces.description: Advanapalli is a village in the Hosur taluk of Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple, Agaram Village, Hosur
topPlaces.description: Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple is a holy Hindu religious site in the village of Agaram Agraharam in Hosur taluk of Krishnagiri district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located 15 km from Hosur on Rayakotta Road and 65 km from Bangalore.

topPlaces.description: Adaikalapuram is a village located under the administration of Mallasandiram Panchayat, Krishnagiri district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located eight kilometers away from the major town of Denkanikottai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Anchettidurgam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Anchettidurgam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (71 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (55 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Anchettidurgam?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Anchettidurgam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Anchettidurgam?
faq.a: Stays in Anchettidurgam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Anchettidurgam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sacred Heart Church, Kelamangalam, Kelamangalam, Advanapalli, Abaya Hastha Swayambu Sri Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple, Agaram Village, Hosur, Ayaranapalli.
